prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic 35mm cinematic action photograph at night: a powerful male biker with a blurred square face placeholder matching an uploaded exact face reference stands balanced on top of a moving black-and-red superbike while performing a dangerous rolling stunt through the center of a futuristic city intersection. He is full body, centered, legs spread on the motorcycle, fists tense, leaning forward with intense confidence, wearing a black leather biker jacket, white tank top, ripped black skinny jeans with a silver chain, black boots, and a necklace. The superbike is angled toward the viewer with bright headlights, glossy red fairings, black trim, and sparks spraying from the lower right side as metal scrapes the wet asphalt. Surround the main rider with exactly 3 other motorcycles in motion: one blurred dark motorcycle passing on the left foreground, one rider with headlights behind the main bike near the center-right, and one red motorcycle farther right. Set the scene in a neon futuristic Times Square-style downtown canyon with tall skyscrapers, glowing cyan and magenta billboards, vertical digital ads, traffic lights, road lane markings, and reflections on rain-soaked pavement. Use dramatic teal-and-pink lighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, motion blur on background riders, crisp focus on the main stunt rider and bike, low-angle perspective, intense speed, realistic lens flares, wet street reflections, and flying orange sparks. Keep the face area as the intended reference face/placeholder, no extra people in the foreground, no readable brand logos, no watermark, no text overlay except indistinct billboard graphics.
